title: Training and events: UKHSA Knowledge and Library Services
body: "Eligibility for KLS training and events  Training sessions are only available to eligible user groups: staff working in UKHSA, Office for Health Improvement and Disparities (OHID) and NHS England public health teams. If you work in local authority public health (LAPH), please visit the dedicated LAPH page for further training information.  If you would like to arrange a session on a date that is not listed below, use our training request form.   KLS induction  An overview of services and resources available from UKHSA’s KLS and how to access them.  Format: online  Audience: everyone eligible to use KLS services  Register for a session  There are currently no confirmed dates for KLS induction. Use our training request form to arrange a session.    Finding the evidence (how to do a literature search)  Provides attendees with the skills and knowledge to conduct a structured literature search using a bibliographic database.  Format: online  Audience: UKHSA, OHID and NHSE staff only  Register for a session  Email us to register for this session:   Finding the evidence on Wednesday 3 December, 2:00pm to 3:30pm     Searching for grey literature   Provides attendees with the skills and knowledge to conduct a structured literature search using up to three sources of grey literature.   Format: online  Audience: UKHSA, OHID and NHSE staff only  Register for a session  Email us to register for this session:   Searching for grey literature on Thursday 11 December, 10:00am to 11:30am     EndNote: an introduction (reference management software)   An overview of EndNote, the reference management software provided for UKHSA staff.   Format: online  Audience: UKHSA, OHID and NHSE staff only  Register for a session  Email us to register for this session:   EndNote: an introduction on Wednesday 10 December, 2:00pm to 3:00pm     EndNote: Cite While You Write   Provides a more in-depth look at EndNote with a focus on the ‘Cite While You Write’ plugin, enabling easy citation of your references within Microsoft Word.   Format: online  Audience: UKHSA, OHID and NHSE staff only  Register for a session  Email us to register for this session:   EndNote: Cite While You Write on Wednesday 17 December, 2:00pm to 3:00pm     EndNote: collaboration and sharing  Provide a more in-depth look at EndNote, with a focus on sharing a library of references where multiple collaborators can edit the same data, and sharing copies of libraries where collaborators make changes for themselves.   Format: online  Audience: UKHSA, OHID and NHSE staff only  Register for a session  There are currently no confirmed dates for EndNote: collaboration and sharing. Use our training request form to arrange a session.     UKHSA Knowledge Management events - Coffee Connect  Take part in this brilliantly simple way to connect with someone you might not normally encounter in your day-to-day work. Sometimes known as a ‘Randomised Coffee Trial’, in this session you will be randomly connected with another member of UKHSA staff and have the opportunity to take the discussion in any direction you wish (with some talking points provided by the KLS team to use if you’d like to).  Format: online  Audience: UKHSA only   Register for a session   Coffee...
